# Re-Intro

## Me in Maps

::::::{.columns}

:::::{.column}

- **Hartlepool**, 1997 - 2016</br>
- **York**, 2016 - 2023</br>
- **London**, 2023 - now</br>

:::::

:::::{.column}

```{python}
from ipywidgets import Layout
from ipyleaflet import Map, Marker, basemap_to_tiles, basemaps, Popup

m = Map(
    basemap=basemap_to_tiles(basemaps.OpenStreetMap.Mapnik, "Hartlepool"),
    center=(53.028, -1.538),
    zoom=6,
    layout=Layout(height='60vh'),
)
# Hartlepool
hartlepool_marker = Marker(location=(54.571, -1.248), title="Hartlepool")
m.add_layer(hartlepool_marker)
# York
york_marker = Marker(location=(53.859, -1.081), title="York")
m.add_layer(york_marker)
# London
london_marker = Marker(location=(51.454, -0.106), title="London")
m.add_layer(london_marker)
m
```

:::::

::::::

## Quick Summary: Work

::::: {layout="[30,70]"}

:::: {.cell}

- Physics
- Fortran
- Python
- C++
- TechSocials
- Teaching
- HPC

::::

:::: {.cell}

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center;">
  <img src="_assets/fortran-logo.svg" alt="Fotran logo" style="max-height: 120px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px;">
  <img src="_assets/cpp-logo.png" alt="C++ logo" style="max-height: 120px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px;">
  <img src="_assets/python-logo.png" alt="Python logo" style="max-height: 120px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px;">
  <img src="_assets/swc-logo.png" alt="Software carpenties logo" style="max-height: 150px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px;">
  <img src="_assets/pizza.png" alt="Pizza emoji" style="max-height: 70px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px;">
  <img src="_assets/k-plan-logo.png" alt="k-Plan logo" style="max-height: 70px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px;">
  <img src="_assets/k-plan-ui.png" alt="k-Plan UI screenshot" style="max-height: 280px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px;">
</div>
```

::::

:::::

## Quick Summary: Hobbies

:::::: {.columns}

::::: {.column .nonincremental}

- [Exercise (running, gym, etc)]{.fragment fragment-index=1}
- [Board games]{.fragment fragment-index=2}
- [Visiting breweries and distilleries]{.fragment fragment-index=3}
- [Hiking]{.fragment fragment-index=5}
- [Wild swimming]{.fragment fragment-index=7}
- [Underwater Hockey (Octopush)]{.fragment fragment-index=8}

:::::

::::: {.column}

:::: {.r-stack}

![](./_assets/inis.jpg){height="300px" .fragment fragment-index=2
.fade-in-then-out}

![](./_assets/bowmore.jpg){height="400px" .fragment fragment-index=3
.fade-in-then-out}

![](./_assets/strathisla.jpg){height="400px" .fragment fragment-index=4
.fade-in-then-out}

![](./_assets/keswick.jpg){height="400px" .fragment fragment-index=5
.fade-in-then-out}

![](./_assets/derwent-water.jpg){height="550px" .fragment fragment-index=6
.fade-in-then-out}

![](./_assets/fairy-pools.jpg){height="550px" .fragment fragment-index=7
.fade-in-then-out}

::: {.fragment fragment-index=8}

```{=html}
<iframe width="500em" height="400em" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/kG-kZM_y0yQ?si=6C3EKzimnzLeZRKe&mute=1" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```

:::

::::

:::::

::::::

## Got married in April 2025

![](./_assets/wedding.jpg){.r-stretch}
